# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'artifactUrl1', description: 'URL for Artifact 1', defaultValue: '')
        string(name: 'artifactUrl2', description: 'URL for Artifact 2', defaultValue: '')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download and Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def deployToProduction = { artifactUrl ->
                        // Logic to download and deploy artifact to production server
                    }

                    if (params.artifactUrl1) {
                        deployToProduction(params.artifactUrl1)
                    }

                    if (params.artifactUrl2) {
                        deployToProduction(params.artifactUrl2)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
